title: Notification No.108/2009-Cus(NT),dt. 06.08.2009
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) Notification No. 108 / 2009-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, dated the 6th August, 2009. 15 Sravana, 1931 Saka. S.O. (E). – In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs (Adjudication), Mumbai to act as a common adjudicating authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on:- 1. the Commissioner of Customs (Export), Jawaharlal Nehru Custom House, Nhava Sheva, Raigad, Maharashtra; 2. the Commissioner of Customs (Export Promotion), New Custom House, Mumbai; and 3. the Commissioner of Customs, New Kandla Custom House, Kandla for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to Show Cause Notice pertaining to M/s. KDL Biotech Limited, Village Savroli, Taluka Khalapur, Disstrict Raigad and others, issued vide, F.No. DRI/MZU/G/Inv-04/07-08-KDL dated 24th April, 2009, by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Mumbai Zonal Unit, Mumbai. [F.No. 437/50/2009-Cus.IV] (M.M.Parthiban) Director (Customs) to the Government of India -- 1 of 1 --
